ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protected_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protected area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the protected area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the protected area */,
  "legal_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal status of the protected area */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Size of the protected area in square kilometers */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of protected area (e.g., national park, wildlife reserve) */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., tropical rainforest, desert) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the protected area was established */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the protected area's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_areas_legal_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("legal_status_id") REFERENCES legal_statuses ("legal_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_statuses" (
  "legal_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal status (e.g., gazetted, not gazetted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legal status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the legal status became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the legal status will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legal_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protected area the regulation applies to */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "enforcement_status" TEXT /* Current enforcement status (e.g., active, pending, revoked) */,
  "enforcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation was enforced */,
  "enforcement_authority" TEXT /* Name of the authority responsible for enforcement */,
  "regulation_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document or legal text of the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., hunting, fishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., recreational, commercial) */,
  "permit_required" INTEGER /* Indicate if a permit is required for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation_activities" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity regulated by the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id", "activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., legal status, regulation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protected area being evaluated */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being evaluated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the protected area for the criterion */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the evaluation */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps for the protected area */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document or report of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES issue_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protected_area_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protected area the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* The note itself */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., informational, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_notes_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protected_area_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protected area the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., boundary adjustment, gazetting) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protected_area_history_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES protected_areas ("area_id")
)
